title: Vilagers Drop Villagers!
description: Villagers now drops Villager item on death you can use anywhere to spawn new one.
body:
Villagers now drops Villager item on death you can use anywhere to spawn new one.

![Villager item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5636fd0fd9c216c4f2f6410d1f70315e87794912.png)
